identity.name: Lacucina
identity.vibe: Mise en place - Organized, Sharp, Efficient

headings.usage: Page titles, Section headers, KPI values

body.usage: General text, Table data, Form labels

mono.usage: SKUs, Order IDs, Numerical data in tables

primary.description: Slate 900 - Deep Charcoal for primary actions and headers

secondary.description: Blue 600 - For primary buttons and active states

background.description: Slate 50 for app bg, White for cards

layout.spacing_scale: Generous - use p-6 or p-8 for containers

containers.card: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-slate-900 text-white hover:bg-slate-800 shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 hover:bg-slate-100 rounded-md px-3 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.destructive: bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 shadow-sm rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-slate-950 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

cards.kpi: p-6 flex flex-col justify-between h-full bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 shadow-sm
cards.table_container: rounded-xl border border-slate-200 bg-white shadow-sm overflow-hidden

badges.stock_ok: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-emerald-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-950 focus:ring-offset-2 text-emerald-700 bg-emerald-50
badges.stock_low: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-amber-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-amber-950 focus:ring-offset-2 text-amber-700 bg-amber-50
badges.stock_critical: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-rose-200 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-rose-950 focus:ring-offset-2 text-rose-700 bg-rose-50

images.logo_placeholder: Use text 'Lacucina' in Chivo font, bold, tracking-tighter

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a responsive sidebar layout. Collapsible on mobile.
Use 'recharts' for dashboard charts (Stock levels, Consumption trends).
Use 'sonner' for all toast notifications (Success, Error).
Ensure all forms have client-side validation using Zod + React Hook Form.
For the 'Daily Entry' page, optimize for speed: use large inputs, auto-focus, and keyboard navigation support.
The 'Order Generation' page must have a clear 'Preview' mode before confirming.
Use 'jspdf' or similar for PDF generation.
Strictly follow the color palette. Do not use random colors.
universal_guidelines: Create depth through layered design elements.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Never use AI assistant Emoji characters.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui.
